        for your users in Prisma SD-WAN policy rules to get a better sense of users'
        actual application experience.

metadata.title: Manage Autonomous DEM Mobile Users
metadata.description:
Learn how to monitor and manage your registered Autonomous
DEM mobile users.

metadata.title: Set up an Autonomous DEM Application Test
metadata.description:
Learn how to start running Autonomous DEM synthetic testing
on your Prisma Access endpoints so that you can collect digital
experience metrics to help you isolate and resolve performance issues.
metadata.keywords: PANW Blue Theme, Cloud-Delivered, SASE, Autonomous DEM Administrator's Guide, Autonomous DEM, Prisma SASE, Remote Networks, Mobile Users

metadata.title: Autonomous DEM Zoom Integration
metadata.description:
ADEM provides a unified dashboard that displays near real-time Zoom meeting quality
        statistics and a root-cause analysis for any poor performing Zoom meeting
        minutes.
metadata.keywords: PANW Blue Theme, Cloud-Delivered, SASE, Autonomous DEM Administrator's Guide, Autonomous DEM, Prisma SASE, Remote Networks, Mobile Users

metadata.title: Access Zoom Application Experience Data
metadata.description:
View the data for the Zoom application experience across your entire organization on
        the Application Details page or for an individual user on the
            User Details page.
metadata.keywords: PANW Blue Theme, Cloud-Delivered, SASE, Autonomous DEM Administrator's Guide, Autonomous DEM, Prisma SASE, Remote Networks, Mobile Users

metadata.title: Possible Root Causes for Performance Degradation
metadata.description: There may be one or more causes for poor Zoom performance.

metadata.title: Manage Autonomous DEM Agent Upgrades
metadata.description:
Decide whether to manually upgrade your Autonomous DEM
agents or SD-WAN remote sites, or upgrade them automatically.

metadata.title: ADEM Licensing
metadata.description:
In order to get access to the metrics gathered by ADEM, you must purchase a Strata
        Cloud Manager Pro licenses.
metadata.keywords: PANW Blue Theme, AI-Powered ADEM, Cloud-Delivered, SASE, Autonomous DEM Administrator's Guide, Autonomous DEM, Prisma SASE, Administration, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Autonomous Digital Experience Management (ADEM)
metadata.description:
With Autonomous DEM you get an insight into remote users' networks (laptops, Wi-Fi,
        SaaS and internal applications, LANs, and traffic levels). This in turn helps you
        troubleshoot their performance-related issues.
metadata.keywords: PANW Blue Theme, AI-Powered ADEM, Cloud-Delivered, SASE, Autonomous DEM Administrator's Guide, Autonomous DEM, Prisma SASE, Administration, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: Monitor Application Experience with Application Tests
metadata.description:
Create synthetic tests originating from an application to one or more targets.
                You can create only one test per application, but an app test can have multiple
                targets.
